summary_markdown:
## What this issue is about
This issue focuses on removing references to LinguaPlone, a translation tool, from the codebase of the Plone discussion package. There is also a need to evaluate whether features previously provided by LinguaPlone are now handled by `plone.app.multilingual` (p.a.multilingual) or if they are still necessary.

## What needs to be done
- Identify and remove all outdated LinguaPlone traces in the code.
- Check and document which features were provided by LinguaPlone.
- Determine if those features are covered by p.a.multilingual or if they still need to be addressed.

## Helpful background
LinguaPlone was used for multilingual content management, but its functionality may now overlap with p.a.multilingual. Familiarity with both tools will be helpful for understanding the scope of this issue.

## Good first steps
1. Explore the codebase for any LinguaPlone references.
2. Review documentation on p.a.multilingual to see if it fulfills the necessary features.
3. Consider reaching out to the community or referring to past discussions for clarification on any ambiguous areas.
4. Be ready to test your changes to ensure functionality remains intact after modifications. Documentation updates may also be necessary.
